text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho is here, and Tosen Jordan's nails
somehow seem to be holding up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's made it this far, to this once-in-a-lifetime
match against her peers. Her appearance
surprises Nakayama Festa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa explains that the Oka Sho has
generated more buzz, but with Jordan competing,
the dice have been recast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This is only the beginning, she declares.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These words come as something of a shock to
Tosen Jordan, who was approaching this race as if
it were her last.
